channel.title: GitHub Svelte Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Svelte in GitHub

item.title: imputnet/cobalt
item.description: best way to save what you love

item.title: leaningtech/webvm
item.description: Virtual Machine for the Web

item.title: skeletonlabs/skeleton
item.description: A complete design system and component solution, built on Tailwind.

item.title: dbgate/dbgate
item.description: Database manager for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite and others. Runs under Windows, Linux, Mac or as web application

item.title: saadeghi/daisyui
item.description: 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼  The most popular, free and open-source Tailwind CSS component library

item.title: ReVanced/revanced-website
item.description: 🌐 Website for ReVanced

item.title: chroxify/haptic
item.description: A new local-first, privacy-focused and open-source home for your markdown notes

item.title: codicocodes/dotfyle
item.description: Find the best Neovim plugins

item.title: basharovV/musicat
item.description: A sleek desktop music player and tagger for offline music 🪕. With gapless playback, smart playlists, and a map view! Built with Svelte and Tauri

item.title: huntabyte/shadcn-svelte
item.description: shadcn/ui, but for Svelte. ✨

item.title: fireship-io/fireship.io
item.description: Build and ship your app faster https://fireship.io

item.title: gurucomputing/headscale-ui
item.description: A web frontend for the headscale Tailscale-compatible coordination server

item.title: sveltejs/realworld
item.description: SvelteKit implementation of the RealWorld app

item.title: sveltejs/svelte.dev
item.description: The Svelte omnisite

item.title: ThaUnknown/miru
item.description: Bittorrent streaming software for cats. Stream anime torrents, real-time with no waiting for downloads.

item.title: mhkeller/layercake
item.description: graphics framework for sveltejs

item.title: GoodiesHQ/headscale-admin
item.description: Admin Web Interface for juanfont/headscale

item.title: SOH69/mm_radio
item.description: A Radio Script for Fivem Server

item.title: mathesar-foundation/mathesar
item.description: Web application providing an intuitive user experience to databases.

item.title: matt8707/ha-fusion
item.description: A modern, easy-to-use and performant custom Home Assistant dashboard

item.title: JacobLinCool/d1-manager
item.description: D1 Manager is a web UI and API for Cloudflare D1, a serverless SQL database. It provides a web interface for managing databases, tables, and records, as well as an AI assistant to help you write query in natural language.
